nodes.name: 澳大利亚
nodes.summary: 澳大利亚是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联221种鸟类，包括南方鶴鴕、鵲鵝、细斑树鸭等221种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

nodes.name: 塔斯馬尼亞州
nodes.summary: 塔斯馬尼亞州是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联47种鸟类，包括澳大利亚麻鸭、Brown quail、Hoary-headed grebe等47种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

nodes.name: 森林
nodes.summary: 森林是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联402种鸟类，包括疣鼻棲鴨、Blue-throated piping guan、White-throated piping guan等402种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

nodes.name: Mallee Woodlands and Shrublands
nodes.summary: Mallee Woodlands and Shrublands是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联10种鸟类，包括Australian owlet-nightjar、Red-backed kingfisher、黄尾黑凤头鹦鹉等10种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

nodes.name: Red-backed kingfisher
nodes.summary: Red-backed kingfisher（Red-backed kingfisher，学名 Todiramphus pyrrhopygius），在图谱中标记为无危（LC）物种，已关联4个分布地点节点。

nodes.name: LC
nodes.summary: LC表示 IUCN 无危等级，当前关联8208种鸟类，如鸵鸟、鸸鹋、南方鶴鴕等8208种鸟类。

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: The red-backed kingfisher is native to most of Australia, except Tasmania and the extreme southwest and southeast of the mainland. It is a summer visitor to the southeast of the country; elsewhere it is resident all year round. It inhabits dry forests, mulga and mallee country, to spinifex and almost treeless country, often far from water. During breeding season, the red-backed kingfisher will move to river courses to make use of the earthy banks to dig nesting burrows. It appears to be partly migratory to the south of the continent for the breeding season, returning north in winter. It is moderately common to uncommon, due to its irregular nomadic movements, probably depending on the occurrence of erratic rainfall
